name: Dome Collection Accent Lamp Gold - Threshold™: ETL Listed, No Assembly, Metal Body
description:
Illuminate any space in your home with modern style with this Dome Collection Accent Lamp Gold - Threshold™. This lamp features a golden metallic dome base with a drum shade for sophisticated flair. The white shade diffuses light for a soft, ambient glow, while the one-way light setting with a simple on/off switch allows for easy operation. Place it on the side table or console table in your entryway or living room for an inviting look.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
